name: get_sleep_data
description: Retrieve sleep tracking data from Withings Sleep Analyzer or ScanWatch. Returns sleep summaries including total duration, time in each sleep stage (deep, light, REM, awake), sleep onset/wakeup times, and a sleep quality score. Can also return detailed per-night breakdowns.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Use 'getsummary' for nightly summaries or 'get' for detailed sleep stage data.

parameters.name: data_fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return: nb_rem_episodes, sleep_efficiency, sleep_latency, total_sleep_time, total_timeinbed, wakeup_latency, deepsleepduration, lightsleepduration, remsleepduration, wakeupduration.
